use_cases: Embed Twitter posts on blogs or news websites for social integration
Display social proof and testimonials on landing pages
Showcase social media feeds in content platforms or dashboards
Integrate real-time tweet displays into community or fan sites
Add social sharing and engagement displays to creator portfolios
ai_summary: A Twitter/X post display component that renders enriched tweet data with custom styling, verified badges, and formatted metrics. Integrates with react-tweet for data fetching and uses Tailwind CSS for a clean, professional appearance. Ideal for embedding social media content on any platform requiring social integration.
